name: dispatch-integrations-block
title: Integrations
description: Integrations block for the Agent-Native Dispatch workspace shell.

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Generated standalone block descriptor plus mounted React block route evidence from the authored workspace shell.

compatibility.shadcn: Studio UI registry metadata generated from Agent-Native template route inventory; source app remains upstream-owned until forked into Jami packages.
compatibility.tailwind: Consumes generated --jami-* CSS variables in the Studio UI workbench port.
